name: Rosalynn Carter's Peanut Brittle
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine sugar, corn syrup, water, and butter in a saucepan. Cook over medium heat until the temperature reaches 230°F on a candy thermometer. Add peanuts and continue cooking until the mixture reaches 280°F. Stir occasionally to prevent burning. Remove from heat.
2. Quickly add baking soda to the mixture and stir rapidly until it foams. Pour the mixture into two buttered, 15x10x1-inch pans, spreading it thinly over the surface of each pan. Allow to cool completely until firm, then break into pieces.
